criteriaResults.evidence: File meta-tests/test-utils-state.bats exists (12499 bytes, 331 lines). Line 5 contains: load 'helpers/test-helper'.
Lines 7-25 define setup() which calls source_harness_lib 'utils.sh' at line 24, after creating temp dir and setting HARNESS_STATE. Runs before every @test block.

Test 'init_harness_state: creates config.json with correct userPrompt and projectType' (lines 31-37) calls init_harness_state with args 'Build a web app' and 'web-app', asserts both fields via assert_json_field. Test #35 passed.
Test 'init_harness_state: creates all required files' (lines 39-46) asserts existence of config.json, cost-log.json, regression/registry.json, progress.md. Test #36 passed.
Test (lines 48-56) checks jq '.invocations | length' is 0 and assert_json_field .totalCost is '0'. Test #37 passed.
Test (lines 58-66) checks jq '.sprints | length' is 0 and assert_json_field .lastFullRun is 'null'. Test #38 passed.
Test (lines 68-73) calls init_harness_state with 'Build a REST API', greps progress.md for prompt text and 'opus'. Test #39 passed.

Test (lines 75-89) exports MODEL=sonnet, CONTEXT_STRATEGY=continue, MAX_SPRINT_ATTEMPTS=5, COST_CAP_PER_SPRINT=50.00, TOTAL_COST_CAP=500.00. Asserts all values reflected in config.json. Test #40 passed.

Test (lines 91-99) unsets env vars in setup(), asserts defaults: model=opus, contextStrategy=reset, maxSprintAttempts=3, costCapPerSprint=25.00, totalCostCap=200.00. Verified these match utils.sh line 84 defaults. Test #41 passed.

Test (lines 105-116) initializes cost-log.json, calls log_cost 'generator' 2 with usage JSON (input_tokens:1500, output_tokens:800). Asserts .invocations[0] has correct role, sprint, inputTokens, outputTokens. Test #42 passed.
Test (lines 118-125) calls log_cost with '{}' and asserts inputTokens=0 and outputTokens=0. No error produced. Test #43 passed.
Test (lines 127-137) calls log_cost 3 times (planner, generator, evaluator), asserts invocations array length is 3. Test #44 passed.
Test (lines 143-151) installs sprint-plan-3sprint.json fixture, calls update_progress 1 'PASS' 1 '', greps for 'Foundation Setup' (sprint 1 name from fixture). Test #45 passed.
Test (lines 153-161) calls update_progress 2 'PASS' 2 '', asserts progress.md contains '**Status**: PASS' and '**Attempt**: 2'. Test #46 passed.
Test (lines 163-169) calls update_progress with merge_sha 'abc123def456', greps for SHA in progress.md. Test #47 passed.
Test (lines 172-179) calls update_progress with empty merge_sha, asserts 'Merge commit' does NOT appear via negated grep. Test #48 passed.
Test (lines 185-196) removes handoff.json, calls update_handoff, asserts file created with .completedSprints, .currentSprint, .git structure. Test #49 passed.
Test (lines 198-206) calls update_handoff 1, verifies .completedSprints contains 1 via jq 'index(1) != null'. Test #50 passed.
Test (lines 208-213) calls update_handoff 3, asserts .currentSprint equals 4 (N+1). Test #51 passed.
Test (lines 216-223) calls update_handoff with tag 'harness/sprint-01/pass' and SHA 'merge-sha-abc', asserts both .git fields match. Test #52 passed.
Test (lines 225-234) calls update_handoff with sprint 1 twice, counts occurrences of 1 in completedSprints array, asserts exactly 1 (no duplicates). Test #53 passed.

Test (lines 236-267) creates handoff.json with projectName, techStack, devServerCommand, devServerPort, completedFeatures, outstandingIssues. After update_handoff, asserts all 6 pre-existing fields preserved. Test #54 passed.
Test (lines 273-292) installs contract-3criteria.json, calls update_regression_registry 1, asserts criteria='C1-01,C1-02,C1-03' and contractPath='sprints/sprint-01/contract.json'. Test #55 passed.
Test (lines 294-303) calls update_regression_registry with no contract file, asserts sprints length 0. Test #56 passed.
Test (lines 305-316) creates empty contract via touch, calls update_regression_registry, asserts registry unchanged (sprints length 0). Test #57 passed.
Test (lines 319-331) installs contract-empty-criteria.json, calls update_regression_registry, asserts sprint entry has criteria length 0. Test #58 passed.
'bash meta-tests/run.sh' exited code 0. TAP output: 1..58, all ok. All test-utils-state.bats tests (ok 35-58) passed. Completed in 3s.

All 24 @test names follow 'function_name: description' pattern. Functions: init_harness_state (7 tests), log_cost (3), update_progress (4), update_handoff (6), update_regression_registry (4). Each name identifies function and specific behavior.
Sprint 1 regression: all 8 test-infrastructure.bats tests pass (ok 1-8). run.sh discovers all 3 .bats files. No sprint 1 files modified (git diff confirms only test-utils-state.bats added).
Sprint 2 regression: all 26 test-utils-pure.bats tests pass (ok 9-34). slugify (9), sprint_pad (4), sprint_dir (3), json_read (6), file_exists (4) all pass. No sprint 2 files modified.

regressionResults.sprint1: PASS -- All 8 infrastructure tests pass. No sprint 1 files modified.
regressionResults.sprint2: PASS -- All 26 pure function tests pass. No sprint 2 files modified.

correctness.notes: All 24 new state management tests pass. Tests accurately validate init_harness_state, log_cost, update_progress, update_handoff, and update_regression_registry against utils.sh behavior.

completeness.notes: Every contracted function covered: init_harness_state (7 tests: creation, defaults, env overrides), log_cost (3: normal, missing fields, accumulation), update_progress (4: sprint name, status/attempt, SHA presence/absence), update_handoff (6: creation, completedSprints, currentSprint, git fields, idempotency, field preservation), update_regression_registry (4: normal, missing contract, empty contract, empty criteria).

errorHandling.notes: Good edge case coverage: missing usage fields default to 0, missing contracts are no-ops, empty contracts are no-ops, empty criteria handled gracefully, idempotent updates. Minor gap: no test for malformed JSON input to log_cost.

codeQuality.notes: Well-organized with section separators, consistent naming, proper use of helpers. Setup overrides test-helper setup() (valid bats pattern) while inheriting teardown(). Each test is isolated via temp directories.

maintainability.notes: Self-documenting test names, no ordering dependencies, reuses sprint 1 fixtures. Easy to extend with additional tests. Run time under 3s for 58 tests.

summary: Sprint 3 PASS. All 30 criteria satisfied. 24 new unit tests for state management functions in test-utils-state.bats, all passing. Full suite: 58/58 tests pass in 3s. Regression sprints 1 and 2 fully intact. No source code modified -- only the new test file was added.
